response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and geospatial experience with open-source contributions, but his background lacks deep focus on C++/Rust or distributed systems for routing pipelines. His geospatial work (GISCollective) and low-latency systems (Sociomantic) are relevant, though the role prioritizes specialized expertise in navigation data processing and modern C++.
strengths: Extensive geospatial experience via GISCollective and Green Map, aligning with routing/navigation domains
Proven ability to build scalable, low-latency systems (e.g., Sociomantic's real-time HTTP services)
Strong open-source contributions and experimentation mindset (e.g., DLang libraries, test frameworks)
concerns: Primary expertise in TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, with limited recent C++/Rust experience (critical for this role)
No explicit mention of routing algorithms, navigation data pipelines, or distributed systems for geospatial data
Diverse but fragmented experience across industries may dilute focus on core routing/tiling challenges
